episode_text:
day=1; meal=bite-sized pizza and broccoli; setting=Personal; time_of_day=noon;
preferences: microwave_time=2 min; occlusion_relevance=do not consider occlusion; robot_speed=slow; skewering_axis=parallel to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=outside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=near; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=speech + LED; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=button; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=speech + LED; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=button; retract_between_bites=no; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=10 sec

microwave_time.user_tendencies: IF dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is non-cold food without sauces/dips THEN 2 min BECAUSE this is the only observed reheating choice so far. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is non-sauce food THEN do not consider occlusion BECAUSE the user accepted no special view-preservation behavior in the observed personal meal. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

robot_speed.user_tendencies: IF dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is non-sauce food THEN slow BECAUSE the user selected a comfort-oriented movement speed in the observed meal. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF feeding food requires fork acquisition AND user has limited mouth opening THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE narrower bites are more compatible with the user's physical constraint, and this was the observed choice. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

web_interface_confirmation.user_tendencies: IF dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is typical solid food THEN no BECAUSE the user chose to avoid the extra confirmation step, consistent with tolerance for faster interaction and their ability to manage occasional failures without added confirmation. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is typical solid food THEN outside mouth transfer BECAUSE the user can lean forward comfortably and selected the less intrusive transfer style. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is outside mouth transfer AND dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN near BECAUSE the user prefers the robot to stop close to the mouth while still requiring self-initiated bite taking. IF transfer_mode is inside mouth transfer THEN not applicable BECAUSE this parameter only applies to outside-mouth transfer. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transf.user_tendencies: IF dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN speech + LED BECAUSE the user selected redundant multimodal signaling, suggesting preference for clear readiness cues. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF task is feeding AND dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE the user has reliable arm control, can press buttons easily, and limited mouth opening makes open-mouth readiness less attractive; this was also the observed choice. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

IF task is drinking AND dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE the user can reliably provide explicit input and selected direct control over sip initiation. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

IF task is mouth wiping AND dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE the user can reliably press buttons and selected explicit control for wipe initiation. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transf.user_tendencies: IF dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN speech + LED BECAUSE the user preferred clear multimodal notification when the tool reached transfer position. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF task is feeding AND dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN perception BECAUSE the user accepted the reliable automatic completion detection for bites, reducing unnecessary manual signaling. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF task is drinking AND dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit completion signaling rather than automatic head-gesture-based detection, despite having good head control. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF task is mouth wiping AND dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN button BECAUSE the user chose explicit completion signaling for wiping. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN no BECAUSE the user accepted keeping the robot from retracting between bites, consistent with prioritizing efficiency over reducing visual obstruction in a personal setting. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food_condition is no sauce or no dippable item THEN do not dip BECAUSE dipping is unnecessary and this was the observed choice. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF dining context is quiet personal AND affective_state is neutral THEN 10 sec BECAUSE the user selected the shortest available wait, consistent with a preference for efficient progression when automation is used. No context-dependent variation observed yet.
